reference: I had a nerve block on S1 and I believe L4. I have bulging discs that are compressing the nerve. My back seems somewhat better; it still lets me know it's there, but I am experiencing pain, tingling, and burning in the left foot, which is the side I had the blocks on. I had an echocardiogram and ankle-brachial index performed on my legs several months ago because of the foot pain, but nothing was found. Can this be coming from my back, or do I have something else going on?
text: I had a nerve block on S one and I believe L four. I have bulging discs that are compressing the nerves. My back seems somewhat better; it still lets me know it's there, but I am experiencing pain tingling and burning in my left foot, which is the side I had the block on. I had an ankle cardiogram and ankle brachial index performed on my legs several months ago because of the foot pain, but nothing was found. Can this be coming from my back, or do I have something else going on?
